name: extension-state-backup
description: Back up installed VS Code extensions, configuration values, and best-effort storage state into separate zip archives, then restore a chosen archive later.

commands.title: Extension State Backup: Backup All Extensions
Extension State Backup: Backup Selected Extension
Extension State Backup: Restore Extension from Zip
Extension State Backup: Open Backup Folder

extensionStateBackup.defaultBackupLocati.description: Optional absolute folder path where extension backup runs are written. When empty, you will be prompted each time.

extensionStateBackup.includeBuiltIn.description: Include built-in VS Code extensions in backup runs. Usually leave this disabled because built-ins are restored by VS Code itself.

extensionStateBackup.includeExtensionFil.description: Include each extension's installed files in its backup archive. Disable this only when you want configuration and storage state snapshots.

extensionStateBackup.includeCurrentWorks.description: Include the current workspace storage folder for each extension when available. Other workspaces are not scanned.

extensionStateBackup.confirmBeforeRestor.description: Ask for confirmation before overwriting an installed extension directory, global storage, workspace storage, or configuration values.
